name: Corn Beef with Colcannon Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare corned beef according to package directions.
2. Toward the end of cooking, cook the shredded cabbage and chopped onion in a small amount of boiling salted water for 15 minutes.
3. Drain the vegetables.
4. Stir into the hot, seasoned mashed potatoes.
5. Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
6. Serves 6.
